metadata.title: HOJTALER — Professional audio distribution
metadata.description: Wholesale distributor for South America representing leading professional audio brands. Technical consulting, system integration, and installer-focused support.

hero.title: Wholesale distributor for South America representing leading professional audio brands
hero.lead: Hojtaler distributes and represents professional audio solutions for integrators, installers, production companies, churches, retail, and corporate projects. Technical consulting, system design, and post-sales support backed by an expert team.

brands.title: Represented brands
brands.footnote: Our portfolio evolves by project and region. Ask our sales team about availability and specific product lines.

solutions.title: Solutions for your project
solutions.lead: We support you from sizing through post-sales, with a technical–commercial mindset and measurable outcomes for every application.

fixed.title: Fixed installation
fixed.desc: Permanent systems with clean integration and long-term reliability.

live.title: Live events
live.desc: Riders, power, and mixing for demanding stages and fast turnarounds.

church.title: Houses of worship
church.desc: Vocal clarity, feedback control, and scalable multi-campus solutions.

retail.title: Retail
retail.desc: Ambient audio and messaging aligned with the brand experience in the space.

hotel.title: Hospitality
hotel.desc: Public areas, ballrooms, and a consistent guest experience.

conference.title: Conference rooms
conference.desc: Video conferencing, speech reinforcement, and acoustics suited to corporate environments.

venues.title: Entertainment & venues
venues.desc: Mid-size and large venues focused on impact and system control.

contact.title: Commercial contact
contact.intro: Send your inquiry by email or message us on WhatsApp. An advisor will review your project and respond with the right technical and commercial proposal.
contact.whatsappPrefill: Hello, I would like to speak with a HOJTALER advisor.

form.name: Name
form.hintAfter: If your email client did not open, use the link above or WhatsApp.
form.hintBefore: Your email app will open with the message ready to send.

placeholders.name: e.g. Jane Smith
placeholders.message: Describe your project: installation type, timelines, indicative budget, lines or equipment of interest…

footer.tagline: Wholesale distribution and representation of professional audio for Venezuela and Latin America. No retail sales.
